title: philotria densa
intro: Philotria densa, also known as the wild orange, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Philotria densa include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve fever, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and fruits can be used to make herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and salves.
